0.q: three copies of HKT were identified in the B. sinuspersici genome ... all three HKT genes, BsHKT1a, BsHKT1b, and BsHKT1c, were classified under HKT subfamily I

1.q: Three copies of HKT were identified in the B. sinuspersici genome... BsHKT1a, BsHKT1b, and BsHKT1c were classified under HKT subfamily I.

2.q: Stable transgenic plants overexpressing 35S::BsHKT1;2 showed higher salt tolerance than non-transgenic plants. Higher biomass and longer roots were observed in the transgenic plants under salt stress.

3.q: Stable transgenic plants overexpressing 35S::BsHKT1;2 showed higher salt tolerance than non-transgenic plants ... associates the role of BsHKT1;2 in imparting salt tolerance
